title: BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
short_info: The latest Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Institute Research Fellow posts! Published on 16 May 2026 at BITS Pilani Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers opening for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing Graduate/Post Graduate qualifications including M.Tech/M.E./B.Tech/B.E. in Chemical/Mechanical/Aerospace/Energy Engineering and allied streams with minimum 60% marks can apply online till 05 June 2026. Find all details about the BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow new vacancy 2026, including eligibility

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate/Post Graduate (M.Tech/M.E./B.Tech/B.E.) in Chemical/Mechanical/Aerospace/Energy Engineering and allied streams with minimum 60% Marks.
qualification.details: Graduate/Post Graduate (M.Tech/M.E./B.Tech/B.E.) in Chemical/Mechanical/Aerospace/Energy Engineering and allied streams with minimum 60% Marks.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BITS Pilani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Institute Research Fellow position at BITS Pilani is 05-06-2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Institute Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Graduate/Post Graduate degree (M.Tech/M.E./B.Tech/B.E.) in Chemical/Mechanical/Aerospace/Energy Engineering or allied streams with a minimum of 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Institute Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Institute Research Fellow position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow recruitment must be submitted online through the official website.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Institute Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Institute Research Fellow position will involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Institute Research Fellow is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Which city and state is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for BITS Pilani, Goa Campus, located in Goa.
